projects.name: Loan Approval Prediction System
projects.description: Designed and deployed Custom tabs, validation rules, Approval Processes and Auto-Response Rules for automating business logic. Leveraged platform events for real-time, asynchronous communication between Salesforce and other applications. Created Lightning Web Components (LWC) for user search and case ownership transfer, leveraging Screen Flows for declarative automation. Developed and maintained Aura Components and complex Flows (Screen Flows, Auto-launched Flows, Record-triggered Flows).
